name: Italian Draughts
author: traditional / AGP port
description: Italian draughts (dama italiana): the traditional 8x8 game per the FID official rules. Men move and capture forward only and can never capture a king; kings are short (non-flying) and capture in all directions. Capture is mandatory and maximal with a strict quality priority chain (most pieces, then with a king, then most kings, then earliest king). Leave the opponent with no legal move to win.
